title: lactuca dentata
intro: Lactuca dentata, also known as prickly lettuce or bitter lettuce, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Lactuca dentata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
